academics.degree: Bachelor of Computer Science Specialization in Data Science

description: Designed and implemented a comprehensive full-stack development curriculum with a focus on the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js).
Led a cohort of 9 students through intensive, hands-on training, guiding them through real-world project development cycles.
Covered essential topics such as front-end design with React, server-side logic in Node.js, and database integration with MongoDB.
Mentored students in project-based learning, resulting in a 60% employment rate among participants within 6 months of graduation.
Introduced Git workflows and Agile methodologies for version control and collaborative development.
Improved and maintained a payout system for a client using React JS, Typescript, Node.js, and MySQL, optimizing performance and ensuring high availability during peak transactions.

Revamped the frontend designs and optimized backend systems for the FOI.gov.ph platform using Python2, Jinja, Google App Engine, and Datastore, leading to a 30% increase in user engagement and department efficiency by streamlining data access and submission processes for government agencies.
Developed a web application dashboard for real-time data tracking and analytics using React JS, Typescript, and Firebase, improving client reporting capabilities.
Automated the text parsing process for a donation platform using Ruby on Rails, reducing manual entry errors by 80%.

Integrated the Face++ API for image recognition and trained a machine learning model using Python-Flask and Google Cloud AutoML Vision as an added feature for an application focused on security verification through ID and face checks.
Co-founded the company and led a team of 5-8 engineers to design and build custom web and mobile applications for over 10 clients across various industries.
Directed the development of web applications using Python-Flask for back-end logic and React JS for front-end interfaces, leading to a 40% reduction in project delivery time.
Managed the company’s internship program, mentoring 14 interns in software engineering.
Introduced Agile methodologies and Scrum practices, improving project management and communication between teams and clients.
Successfully delivered solutions for client businesses that helped them scale their operations and improve their digital presence.
Developed and implemented improvements for the Customized Statement of Account System using .Net.
Collaborated with senior developers to propose and prototype innovative project solutions, earning recognition among the top 10 interns for contributing valuable ideas to ongoing projects.

projects.name: Olympus_QA - Greek Mythology Question Answering System
description: Developed a question-answering system focused on Greek mythology, utilizing advanced NLP techniques, including fine-tuning pre-trained models for enhanced domain-specific accuracy. Leveraged Haystack to efficiently retrieve relevant information, optimizing query responses and boosting the system’s performance by training on specialized datasets related to Greek mythology. The fine-tuning process involved adjusting model parameters to improve contextual understanding and response precision for mythological queries.

projects.name: AI-Powered Recruitment Assistant
description: Developed and deployed a recruitment assistant that uses AI to enhance candidate evaluation, integrating NLP techniques and modular microservice design.

projects.name: EFOI
description: Implemented features’ improvements and adjustments on the backend and frontend of the Electronic Freedom of Information Platform, improving data access for government agencies.

projects.name: GivingSide
description: Built a pipeline for automating text parsing with regular expressions, improving the efficiency of the donation platform.

projects.name: Sentimental Analysis
description: Developed a recurrent neural network to determine the sentiment of movie reviews using the IMDB dataset, applying machine learning methods to text data.

projects.name: Udagram
description: Refactored a cloud application from monolith to microservices and serverless architectures, improving user interactions and scalability.
